llm.summary: The task is complete in substance. The repository has Prisma/SQLite dependencies and configuration, migrations and schema for endpoint persistence, deterministic db preparation, idempotent seed defaults, generated schema documentation matching the implemented models, and repeatability unit coverage. The provided mandatory gates all passed.
satisfied_exit_criteria: npm run db:prepare creates/updates SQLite runtime state using Prisma migrations, client generation, and seed defaults.
db:prepare repeatability is covered by tests that run it twice against an isolated SQLite database and assert singular seed rows.

Schema represents endpoint names, title/description, enabled state, immutable IDs, ordered parameters, response cases, default responses, delete codes, timestamps, and basic endpoint/case failure config fields.
docs/generated/db-schema.md matches the implemented Endpoint, EndpointParam, and ResponseCase persistence shape and seed assumptions.
Required checks passed: npm run db:prepare, npm run test:unit, and npm run verify.
